violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024
Spray bottle used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies was not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

Foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024
Refrigerator and freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gaskets must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the handsink and 3-bay sink area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Coving must be installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2023

The ceiling throughout the kitchen is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Tiles are heavily soiled and no longer able to be cleaned. Ceiling tiles must be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2023
